visual_description: A flat-screen TV mounted on a dark, textured wall shows a news broadcast that begins with a person in white attending to a patient on a stretcher behind blue-and-white tape. The broadcast then switches to a male news anchor speaking, and later splits to show a masked medical professional on one side and the anchor on the other. In the foreground, a group of people, primarily men in light blue shirts, stand with their backs to the camera, watching the screen in a room with glass partitions and hanging lamps.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
